name: Pepper Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before preparing the slaw, grind all vegetables through a coarse blade of a meat grinder.
2. Sprinkle the ground vegetables with salt and mix well. Let stand overnight.
3. Drain off the juice from the vegetables. Add mustard seeds, celery seed, and sugar to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Just before packing into hot sterilized jars, add vinegar to cover. Pack the jars tightly and seal them immediately.
5. Store in a cool place for up to one year. This recipe makes 14 pints.
